prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Flashing & WRB integration, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: reverse-lapped WRB (upper layer behind lower). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: IRC R703, mfr instructions.
title: Sequence check: Flashing & WRB integration (residential job)
